Condition1Values: Presence of any of Ind2 Value 0, 1, 2, 4, 5, 6, 7, OR 8, OR $i, OR $g,OR $h
Justification for Mapping:
Note giving context to alternative title, including prefix from indicator 2, subfield $i, and miscellaneous information from $g or $h. 

See note at bottom of https://www.loc.gov/marc/bibliographic/bd246.html.  Prior to definition of $g, $h was used for miscellaneous information.  Note that its definition is not given in the list of subfields, even though the subfield has the title "Medium".  I think it's safer to map it to a note.  LNA 1/5/2025
Transformation Notes: "Note on variant title:  [2nd indicator label] OR (i): (a), (b}, {f}, {n}, {p}. ; (g), (h) ." [if presentt]
